task: Fix the intermittent 500 on POST /checkout without changing the response schema

definition_of_done.goal: npm test checkout exits 0 and the 500 no longer reproduces over 50 runs of scripts/repro_checkout.sh

stop_conditions.success: all acceptance checks pass and diff stays within touched checkout module

maker_checker.scope: fresh-context reviewer sees only the diff + acceptance checks; flags correctness / stated-requirement gaps only

harness_primitives: git worktree isolation for reversible work
pre-commit hook runs the check as a deterministic gate
external scratch file for run-state across context resets

risk_guards.risk: reward hacking / test overfitting (agent edits the test to pass)
risk_guards.mitigation: checker diffs test files; repro script is independent of the unit test
stop after 3 consecutive same-type failures and change strategy, not head-bang
no production resources; sandbox + least-privilege tokens
